name: shipkit-pipe
description: Your automated dev team. One command sets up CI/CD, health monitoring, security scanning, and AI agent config. Only generates what your project needs.
author: Sagar Giri <hello@sagargiri.com> (https://github.com/sagar-grv)

scripts.test: node bin/shipkit-pipe.js --help && node bin/shipkit-pipe.js --version && node bin/shipkit-pipe.js --dry-run && node bin/shipkit-pipe.js check && node bin/shipkit-pipe.js check --json && echo 'All tests passed'
scripts.prepublishOnly: npm test && echo '✓ All checks passed — proceeding with publish'
